functions.name: addMeilisearch
functions.description: Adds an Meilisearch container resource to the application model. The default image is and the tag is .
functions.signature: addMeilisearch(name: string, masterKey?: ParameterResource, port?: number): MeilisearchResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: masterKey
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the master key for the Meilisearch. If `null` a random master key will be generated.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The host port to bind the underlying container to.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Meilisearch

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: masterKeyParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the Meilisearch superuser password.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the Meilisearch. This endpoint is used for all API calls over HTTP.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the Meilisearch server.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Meilisearch container resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Meilisearch container resource.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

handleTypes.name: MeilisearchResource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents a Meilisearch
